description.value:
A longsword with an unusually fine edge and a grip wrapped in faded black leather. The steel is flawless - unnaturally so. It has seen too many battles and none of its own.

Curse. On a critical hit, the wielder must succeed on a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw or be unable to take the Attack action on their next turn, frozen by a vision of the blade turning against someone they love.

unidentified.description: A fine longsword, clearly well-made. Something about its weight sits wrong in the hand.

cursedMeta.decoyAppearance: A fine longsword. The blade holds its edge unusually well.
cursedMeta.trueNature: On crit, DC 13 Wis save or lose Attack action next turn.

curse.name: The Hollow Edge
curse.description: On a critical hit with this weapon the wielder makes a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure they cannot take the Attack action on their next turn.

hints: After a telling strike the wielder mutters a stranger's name and cannot recall why.

escalation.effect: A heartbeat of wrongness after a solid hit, then it passes.
